security.title: Optimal Security

terms.title: Introduction
contents: By using this service, you agree to the terms of use. Please read them carefully before accessing or using the service.
This service is designed to help entrepreneurs manage their finances and sports activities. Its use is subject to the conditions set out below.

terms.title: Acceptance of Terms
contents: By accessing or using this service, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the service.

We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Any changes will be posted on this page. Your continued use of the service after such modifications constitutes your acceptance of said modifications.

terms.title: Use of Service
contents: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login information.
You agree not to use the service for illegal or unauthorized purposes.
You agree not to access the source code of the service or modify it in any way.
You agree not to use the service for any activity that could harm the security or integrity of the service or any other computer system.

terms.title: User Data
contents: You retain ownership of all data you enter or upload to the service.
We will not claim any ownership rights to your data.
You consent to our use of your data to provide and improve the service, as well as for analytical and marketing purposes.

terms.title: Limitation of Liability
contents: We will not be liable for direct, indirect, incidental, special or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the service.
We do not guarantee that the service will be error-free or uninterrupted.

terms.title: Applicable Law
contents: These terms are governed by the laws in force in your country of residence.
Any dispute arising from these terms will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts of your country of residence.

NotFoundPage.title: Page Not Found
NotFoundPage.description: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for.

security.title: Security
security.description: Manage your account security settings, including two-factor authentication, password and email changes.

upload.errorRetry: Unable to upload image. Please try again.

form.nameValidationError: Name must not contain two consecutive spaces

name.min: Name must be at least 2 characters

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.description: Update your password to secure your account

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account

typeSelection.title: Authentication Type
typeSelection.description: Choose your preferred method for two-factor authentication
typeSelection.help: TOTP: Authentication app (Google Auth, Authy) | OTP: Codes sent by email
typeSelection.error: You must first enable two-factor authentication

modal.enableDescription: To enable two-factor authentication, please confirm your password.
modal.disableDescription: To disable two-factor authentication, please confirm your password.

setup.title: 2FA Setup Successful
setup.description: Your two-factor authentication has been enabled. Scan the QR code and note your backup codes.
setup.qrDescription: Scan this QR code with your authentication app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
setup.backupDescription: Keep these codes safe. They will allow you to access your account if you lose your device.
setup.totpDescription: If the QR code doesn't work, you can use this URI manually:

validation.title: Validate 2FA Configuration
validation.description: Enter the first backup code to validate that your authentication app works correctly.
validation.codeHelper: Use the first code from the list:

listTokens.title: Active Sessions
listTokens.description: Manage your sessions and access tokens. You can revoke suspicious or unused sessions.
listTokens.sessionCount: {count, plural, =0 {No active sessions} one {# active session} other {# active sessions}}

emailDigest.title: Daily email digest
emailDigest.description: Receive a daily summary of your activities

description.uploading: Please wait while your files are being uploaded

image.single: Drag or drop your image here or click to upload (WebP, JPEG, PNG)
image.multiple: Drag or drop your images here or click to upload (WebP, JPEG, PNG)

file.single: Drag or drop your file here or click to upload
file.multiple: Drag or drop your files here or click to upload

errors.imageOnly: Only images are allowed (WebP, JPEG, JPG, PNG)
errors.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size: {maxSize} MB

name.min: Name must be at least 3 characters
name.max: Name must not contain more than 30 characters

name.min: Name must be at least 3 characters
name.max: Name must not contain more than 30 characters

verify.subject: Verify your email address
verify.preview: You have requested a magic link to connect to your account.
verify.title: Login
verify.ignoreMessage: If you did not request this link, please ignore this email.

resetPassword.subject: Reset your password
resetPassword.preview: You have requested to reset your password.
resetPassword.title: Password Reset
resetPassword.clickToReset: Click here to reset your password
resetPassword.ignoreMessage: If you did not request this reset, please ignore this email.
resetPassword.expirationWarning: This link will expire in 24 hours.

welcome.subject: Welcome to {appName}
welcome.preview: Welcome! Your account has been successfully created.
welcome.title: Welcome!
welcome.welcomeMessage: Thank you for signing up for {appName}. Your account has been successfully created.

emailChange.subject: Email change confirmation
emailChange.preview: You have requested to change your email address.
emailChange.title: Email Change Confirmation
emailChange.clickToConfirm: Click here to confirm your new email address
emailChange.ignoreMessage: If you did not request this change, please ignore this email.

verification.subject: Verify your email address
verification.preview: Verify your email address to activate your account
verification.title: Email Verification
verification.welcomeMessage: Thank you for signing up! To activate your account, please click on the link below:
verification.expirationWarning: This link will expire in 24 hours.
verification.ignoreMessage: If you did not create an account, you can safely ignore this email.

otp.subject: Two-factor verification code
otp.title: Verification Code
otp.description: Here is your two-factor verification code:
otp.expirationWarning: This code will expire in 5 minutes.
otp.orCopyCode: Or copy the code above into the application
otp.ignoreMessage: If you did not request this code, you can safely ignore this email.

userCreated.subject: New user created
userCreated.preview: A new user has signed up on the platform.
userCreated.title: New User
userCreated.userInfo: A new user has signed up:

userDeleted.subject: User deleted
userDeleted.preview: A user has been deleted from the platform.
userDeleted.title: User Deleted
userDeleted.userInfo: The following user has been deleted:

systemAlert.subject: System Alert
systemAlert.preview: A system alert has been triggered.
systemAlert.title: System Alert
systemAlert.alertMessage: A system alert has been triggered:

organizationInvitation.subject: Invitation to join {teamName}
organizationInvitation.title: Organization Invitation
organizationInvitation.invitationMessage: {invitedByUsername} ({invitedByEmail}) invites you to join the organization {teamName}.
organizationInvitation.acceptInvitation: To accept this invitation, please click on the following link:
organizationInvitation.expirationWarning: This link will expire in 24 hours.
organizationInvitation.ignoreMessage: If you did not initiate this request, you can ignore this email.
